$comment: Canonical AgentsKit brand tokens. Owned in this repo. scripts/sync-brand.mjs generates per-repo copies (CSS custom properties / inline <style> / os-ui feed) from this file. Edit here, never in a generated copy. Structure + type + radii + motion are shared across all four product properties; only `accent` varies per property (one family, per-property accent).

color.$comment: Shared structural palette (GitHub-inspired, dark-first). Identical across product properties.

accent.$comment: Per-property accent hue. The ONLY token that differs between properties. Values mirror ecosystem.json accents. sync-brand.mjs picks the entry matching --property.
